title: Evangelion 30 Story Hopes Predictions
wikitext:

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Mar 25, 2012 9:11 am Don't care, just hoping for Arael or n Arael-like angel 'cause it is the only one not to be in the movies in spirit. (and don't give me the "Well Bardiel took out Asuka blah blah blah", that is not actual mind rape rays nor a bird of light) It would also be nice to have an Armisael-like angel 'cause mere back mutation by itslef is a bit iffy for being in spirit.
